risk_description: Clinical hallucinations: Model generates plausible but fabricated medical references or diagnostic suggestions not supported by evidence (current rate: 3.4%)
mitigation_strategy: Implement output verification layer cross-referencing curated medical KB; add confidence thresholds; establish physician feedback loop for hallucination reporting

risk_description: Demographic bias: Training data underrepresents Eastern European, Sub-Saharan African, and Southeast Asian populations, leading to potential diagnostic disparities
mitigation_strategy: Stratified performance audits across demographics; augment training data; implement bias monitoring dashboards; establish fairness thresholds per EU AI Act Art. 10

risk_description: EU AI Act non-compliance: Failure to complete conformity assessment before market entry could result in penalties up to 3% of global turnover and deployment prohibition
mitigation_strategy: Engage Notified Body for conformity assessment; complete technical documentation per Art. 11-12; track regulatory deadlines

risk_description: Patient data re-identification: Residual re-identification risk through quasi-identifier combinations or model memorization of training data patterns despite de-identification pipeline
mitigation_strategy: Quarterly re-identification risk assessments; differential privacy for fine-tuning; enhanced de-identification for edge cases; membership inference testing

risk_description: Foundation model vendor dependency: FoundationHealth Inc. controls model weights, update cadence, and API availability. Unilateral updates could alter clinical performance; discontinuation would halt operations
mitigation_strategy: Contractual protections (versioning, rollback, 90-day notice); fallback model strategy; regression testing for vendor updates; explore model distillation

risk_description: Model drift: Performance degradation over time due to evolving clinical practices, new diseases, or changing patient populations without adequate monitoring
mitigation_strategy: Continuous performance monitoring with automated alerts; quarterly re-validation; define performance floor thresholds triggering retraining or withdrawal

risk_description: Automation bias: Physicians may over-rely on ClinicalCompanion suggestions without sufficient independent judgment, particularly under time pressure or fatigue
mitigation_strategy: UI requires active physician confirmation; uncertainty indicators; mandatory user training; periodic physician override rate assessments

risk_description: Cross-border data transfer: Patient data flowing between EU infrastructure and US-based FoundationHealth API may violate GDPR Chapter V, particularly post-Schrems II
mitigation_strategy: EU-only processing where possible; Standard Contractual Clauses with FoundationHealth; Transfer Impact Assessment; explore EU-hosted model alternatives
